salts.params: Baseline reef-safe formula near natural seawater levels (alk/ca/mg not elevated)
Enriched with extra calcium and trace elements for coral growth vs standard Sea Salt
Elevated alkalinity (11-12.4 dKH) and calcium for enhanced coral calcification (SPS-friendly)

Balanced bio-active formula with elevated calcium/magnesium tuned for reef tanks
Near-natural seawater parameters, low nutrient, favored for sensitive/mixed reef systems
Elevated alk/ca/mg profile formulated for stony coral growth and stability
USP/ACS reagent-grade ingredients, natural seawater ratios (~7.5 dKH alk) for reef stability
Elevated alk/ca/mg (SPS-focused), low phosphate/nitrate for pristine reef water
Balanced general-reef formula, moderate alk/ca for mixed fish/coral systems
Elevated calcium, magnesium and strontium vs natural seawater for reef growth
Natural seawater ionic balance with added trace elements, low-nutrient reef formula
